diagrams.title: Performance vs Utilization Curve
diagrams.description: Shows relationship between system utilization and response time/performance
diagrams.purpose: Understanding capacity limits and planning thresholds

diagrams.title: Response Time Components
diagrams.description: Breakdown of what constitutes total response time in a system

diagrams.title: Capacity Planning Measurement Framework
diagrams.description: Framework showing types of measurements and their relationships
diagrams.purpose: Understanding measurement ecosystem in capacity planning

diagrams.title: Throughput-Latency Trade-off
diagrams.description: Shows inverse relationship between throughput and latency under load
elements: Low load: Low latency, Low throughput
Medium load: Moderate latency, Good throughput
High load: High latency, Maximum throughput
Peak: Maximum throughput, Very high latency
